nasb.text: ‘Then on the second day: twelve bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: “On the second day twelve bulls from the herd, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,

cnv.text: “‘第二日，要獻公牛犢十二頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻，

ccb.text: “节期的第二天，你们要献上毫无残疾的公牛犊十二头、公绵羊两只和一岁的公羊羔十四只；
